=Google Drive Folder: {{ $json.link }} 
Please upload all social media content to this folder.

parameters.jsCode:
// WELCOME EMAIL GENERATOR // Use this in the "Generate Welcome Email" Code node const leadData = $input.first().json; // Extract data from our cleaned structure const clientName = leadData.taskName || 'Valued Client'; const clientEmail = leadData.clientEmail || 'client@example.com'; const clientPhone = leadData.clientPhone || 'Not provided'; const leadStatus = leadData.leadStatus || 'Unknown'; // Get current date for personalization const currentDate = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); // Generate personalized welcome email const welcomeEmail = { to: clientEmail, subject: `🎉 Welcome ${clientName}! Your project has been approved`, html: `

🎉 Congratulations ${clientName}!

Your project has been approved and we're ready to get started!

We're thrilled to welcome you to our service family! Your project request has been carefully reviewed and approved on ${currentDate}.

✅ Status: ${leadStatus}

🚀 What happens next?

  • Within 24-48 hours: Our project team will begin working on your request
  • Project Manager Assignment: You'll be assigned a dedicated project manager
  • Regular Updates: You'll receive progress updates throughout the project
  • Direct Communication: Your project manager will contact you at ${clientPhone}
  • Quality Assurance: We'll keep you informed every step of the way

📞 Your Contact Information

Email: ${clientEmail}

Phone: ${clientPhone}

Please ensure these details are correct for project communication.

💬 Contact Your Project Manager

📚 Helpful Resources

  • Project Timeline & Milestones
  • Client Portal Access
  • Frequently Asked Questions

If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're here to ensure your project exceeds expectations!

Your Service Team
📧 support@your-company.com | 📞 +1 (555) 123-4567
Visit our website

`, // Plain text version for email clients that don't support HTML text: ` Welcome ${clientName}! Congratulations! Your project has been approved on ${currentDate}. What happens next: - Our team will begin working within 24-48 hours - You'll be assigned a dedicated project manager - Regular updates throughout the project - Direct communication at ${clientPhone} Your contact information: Email: ${clientEmail} Phone: ${clientPhone} If you have any questions, please contact us at support@your-company.com. Best regards, Your Service Team `, // Metadata for logging/tracking clientName: clientName, clientEmail: clientEmail, leadStatus: leadStatus, sentAt: new Date().toISOString(), taskId: leadData.taskId }; return [welcomeEmail];

// FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE GENERATOR // Fixed to return single email item instead of array const leadData = $input.first().json; // Extract client information const clientName = leadData.taskName || 'Valued Client'; const clientEmail = leadData.clientEmail || 'client@example.com'; const clientPhone = leadData.clientPhone || '+1234567890'; const taskId = leadData.taskId || 'unknown'; // For "No Response" status, send immediate follow-up email const followUpEmail = { day: 1, type: 'email', urgency: 'gentle', subject: `Following up on your inquiry - ${clientName}`, message: `Hi ${clientName}, I hope this message finds you well! I wanted to follow up on your recent inquiry with us. I understand you might be busy or still considering your options, and that's completely okay. I'm here to answer any questions you might have or provide additional information that could help with your decision. Would you like to schedule a quick 15-minute call to discuss your project in more detail? I'm available at your convenience. Looking forward to hearing from you! Best regards, Your Project Team P.S. Feel free to reply to this email or call us directly if you prefer to speak over the phone.`, html: `

Hi ${clientName}! 👋

I hope this message finds you well! I wanted to follow up on your recent inquiry with us.

I understand you might be busy or still considering your options, and that's completely okay. I'm here to answer any questions you might have or provide additional information that could help with your decision.

Would you like to schedule a quick 15-minute call to discuss your project in more detail? I'm available at your convenience.

📅 Schedule a Call

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best regards,
Your Project Team

P.S. Feel free to reply to this email or call us directly if you prefer to speak over the phone.

`, clientName, clientEmail, clientPhone, taskId, sentAt: new Date().toISOString() }; // Return single item for immediate processing return [followUpEmail];
